TestPlanReview.md
─────────────────
scores:
specificity: 0-2
grounding: 0-2
scope_fidelity: 0-2
actionability: 0-2
consistency: 0-2
verdict: Ready/Revise/Rework
before_scores: (if revised)
auto_revised: true/false
